attacking_style: Pure sprinter who does not attack; relies entirely on positioning in final kilometers and launching from leadout trains in flat finales.
team_tactics: Heavily dependent on structured leadouts, particularly via Guarnieri. Team delivers excellent positioning but Demare frequently fails to convert despite perfect setup.
terrain_preference: Flat bunch sprints only. Any attritional racing, technical finales requiring repeated accelerations, or tempo increases on undulating terrain expose significant weaknesses.
vulnerability: Cannot handle selective racing or sustained tempo increases that create attrition. Post-crash recovery efforts devastate sprint power. Peak speed insufficient when perfectly positioned.
key_patterns: Repeatedly finishes second despite optimal leadout positioning, indicating insufficient peak watts (4 instances)
Eliminated or struggles when racing becomes attritional via tempo or terrain (2 instances)
Energy expenditure from crashes or chases directly compromises finishing sprint power (2 instances)
Technical finales requiring navigation skill lead to failed conversions even when leading (2 instances)
Form decline visible mid-stage race when previously consistent (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows declining ability to handle attritional racing and first intermediate sprint loss after consistent week, suggesting downward trend from already disappointing 2022
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 5
